rationale: The citing paper mentions Deng and Mela (2018) mainly as part of a broad list of prior TV ad-avoidance studies and as a benchmark for reported ad-skip rates in the data description. It does not build its conceptual framework, identification strategy, or empirical model on that paper specifically. The core contribution in the citing paper is an energy-in-ad-content measure and its association with tuning, which is developed independently of the cited paper's targeting model.
